entry.title: Three cities record very unhealthy API, Kuching flights unaffected

link.title: Three cities record very unhealthy API, Kuching flights unaffected

entry.content:
Sri Aman, Sarawak has recorded a very unhealthy Air Pollution Index (API), raising the total area recording API exceeding 200 to three areas, as at 8 am on Sunday.
Sarawak Disaster Management Committee (JPBN) secretariat head, Major Ismail Mahedin from the Malaysian Civil Defence Force (APM) Sarawak said the API reading at Sri Aman rose to 299 this morning, joining Kuching and Samarahan to record very unhealthy API reading.
Meanwhile, Kuching International Airport (KIA) spokesman said all flights at are still proceeding smoothly as usual even though the haze situation worsens in the city.
Read more at
entry.summary: Sri Aman, Sarawak has recorded a very unhealthy Air Pollution Index (API), raising the total area recording API exceeding 200 to three areas, as at 8 am on Sunday. Sarawak Disaster Management Committee (JPBN) secretariat head, Major Ismail Mahedin from the Malaysian Civil Defence Force (APM) Sarawak said the API reading at Sri Aman rose to 299 this morning, joining Kuching and Samarahan to record very unhealthy API reading. Meanwhile, Kuching International Airport (KIA) spokesman said all flights at are still proceeding smoothly as usual even though the haze situation worsens in the city. Read more at

entry.title: Sabaat Episode 20 Promo HUM TV Drama

link.title: Sabaat Episode 20 Promo HUM TV Drama

entry.content:
Sabaat, Episode 20 Promo, Official HD Video - 16 August 2020
The story of Sabaat is a saga of life’s greatest reality that nothing lasts forever and the only thing that stands the test of time is family, love and relations built on truth, sincerity and mutual respect. The story of this serial revolves around the wealthy Farid family. Meeral Farid is a young, bold and vivacious girl but she is narcissist and egocentric and wants to keep everything about life and family under her control, especially her brother Hasan Farid. Being her ‘partner in crime’, Hasan’s life is hugely influenced by Meeral’s decisions but the story takes an interesting turn when he decides to break free of the chains and rules set by his sister to pursue his dreams. What follows is an epic tale of brother-sister rivalry and Meeral’s fight against time itself.
Starring:
Mawra Hocane, Osman Mukhtar, Ameer Gilani, Sarah Khan, Seemi Raheel, Syed Muhammad Ahmed, Jahanzeb, Abbas Ashraf Awan, Jaweria Kamran, Leyla Zuberi, Moazzam Ali Khan & Others
Directed By: Shehzad Kashmiri
Written By: Kashif Anwar
Produced By: Momina Duraid Production
#Sabaat #HUMTV #MawraHocane #Osman Mukhtar #Ameer Gilani #Drama #2020
entry.summary: Sabaat, Episode 20 Promo, Official HD Video - 16 August 2020 The story of Sabaat is a saga of life’s greatest reality that nothing lasts forever and the only thing that stands the test of time is family, love and relations built on truth, sincerity and mutual respect. The story of this serial revolves around the wealthy Farid family. Meeral Farid is a young, bold and vivacious girl but she is narcissist and egocentric and wants to keep everything about life and family under her control, especially her brother Hasan Farid. Being her ‘partner in crime’, Hasan’s life is hugely influenced by Meeral’s decisions but the story takes an interesting turn when he decides to break free of the chains and rules set by his sister to pursue his dreams. What follows is an epic tale of brother-sister rivalry and Meeral’s fight against time itself. Starring: Mawra Hocane, Osman Mukhtar, Ameer Gilani, Sarah Khan, Seemi Raheel, Syed Muhammad Ahmed, Jahanzeb, Abbas Ashraf Awan, Jaweria Kamran, Leyla Zuberi, Moazzam Ali Khan & Others Directed By: Shehzad Kashmiri Written By: Kashif Anwar Produced By: Momina Duraid Production #Sabaat #HUMTV #MawraHocane #Osman Mukhtar #Ameer Gilani #Drama #2020

entry.title: Vacances : les touristes profitent de la chaleur

link.title: Vacances : les touristes profitent de la chaleur

entry.content:
La canicule continue de s’étendre en France. Le thermomètre a frôlé les 40 degrés. Cinq départements supplémentaires ont été placés en vigilance orange. Pour beaucoup de Français, la baignade s’imposait samedi 9 aout.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: La canicule continue de s’étendre en France. Le thermomètre a frôlé les 40 degrés. Cinq départements supplémentaires ont été placés en vigilance orange. Pour beaucoup de Français, la baignade s’imposait samedi 9 aout. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Let’s Play TWD Season 1 First Zombie Kill

link.title: Let’s Play TWD Season 1 First Zombie Kill

entry.content:
First game play of TWD (Telltale Collections) season 1. This is where Lee meets Sandra, Clementine’s babysitter turned Z. My official first kill for the game.
And since I am a nooby player, my first kill ever. I grew hair that day. Now, I am complete.
Stay safe everyone. Stay sane.
PEACE
entry.summary: First game play of TWD (Telltale Collections) season 1. This is where Lee meets Sandra, Clementine’s babysitter turned Z. My official first kill for the game. And since I am a nooby player, my first kill ever. I grew hair that day. Now, I am complete. Stay safe everyone. Stay sane. PEACE

entry.title: HILANGNYA KEMERIAHAN LOMBA 17-AN DI TAHUN 2020

link.title: HILANGNYA KEMERIAHAN LOMBA 17-AN DI TAHUN 2020

entry.content:
Di tahun 2020 ini, kemeriahan lomba 17-an yang biasanya riuh terdengar kali ini tidak lagi ada. Pasalnya, Pemerintah Kota Surabaya mengimbau agar kerumunan-kerumunan seperti itu tidak dilakukan.
Yuk tonton keseruan Blusukan yang dilakukan tim Beritajatim TV mengulas soal kemeriahan 17-an.
entry.summary: Di tahun 2020 ini, kemeriahan lomba 17-an yang biasanya riuh terdengar kali ini tidak lagi ada. Pasalnya, Pemerintah Kota Surabaya mengimbau agar kerumunan-kerumunan seperti itu tidak dilakukan. Yuk tonton keseruan Blusukan yang dilakukan tim Beritajatim TV mengulas soal kemeriahan 17-an.

entry.title: Simon Cowell ‘planning BGT return’ weeks after breaking back

link.title: Simon Cowell ‘planning BGT return’ weeks after breaking back

entry.content: ‘Britain’s Got Talent’ judge Simon Cowell is expected to film a one-off special of the show in October, just weeks after he broke his back after falling off his electric bike.
entry.summary: ‘Britain’s Got Talent’ judge Simon Cowell is expected to film a one-off special of the show in October, just weeks after he broke his back after falling off his electric bike.

entry.title: Horoscope Predictions For May 2020 Ft. Devina - POPxo Zodiac

link.title: Horoscope Predictions For May 2020 Ft. Devina - POPxo Zodiac

entry.content:
The year 2020 is turning out to be more unpredictable than anything one could have ever imagined. Not only has the year already seen a global pandemic bringing the lives of humans to a complete halt but also in a span of just 4 months, we’ve lost some of the most favourite celebrities like Irrfan Khan, Rishi Kapoor, Kobe Bryant and many others. Almost everyone in the world right now is sceptical about the future and is concerned if things seem to be getting better any time soon. Well, if you too are keen to know what the future awaits you then we at POPxo have got you covered.
Watch today’s episode of #POPxoZodiac as Devina from The Light Within shares with us the #HoroscopePredictions for all #ZodiacSigns for the month of May 2020.
entry.summary: The year 2020 is turning out to be more unpredictable than anything one could have ever imagined. Not only has the year already seen a global pandemic bringing the lives of humans to a complete halt but also in a span of just 4 months, we’ve lost some of the most favourite celebrities like Irrfan Khan, Rishi Kapoor, Kobe Bryant and many others. Almost everyone in the world right now is sceptical about the future and is concerned if things seem to be getting better any time soon. Well, if you too are keen to know what the future awaits you then we at POPxo have got you covered. Watch today’s episode of #POPxoZodiac as Devina from The Light Within shares with us the #HoroscopePredictions for all #ZodiacSigns for the month of May 2020.

entry.title: Bisnis Kuliner Sehat Tetap Eksis

link.title: Bisnis Kuliner Sehat Tetap Eksis

entry.content:
BANDUNG, KOMPAS.TV - Jika usaha-usaha lain meredup ditengah pandemi, lain halnya dengan usaha makanan sehat atau healthy food ini.
Masyarakat yang kini semakin sadar akan pentingnya asupan makanan yang sehat bagi tubuh, membuat kedai mamocy tak pernah sepi pelanggan.
Setiap harinya, driver ojek daring hilir mudik mengambil pesanan dari kedai miliknya, di kawasan Arcamanik, Kota Bandung.
Menurut pemilik kedai, makanan sehat, makanan yang disediakan tanpa bahan pengawet dan msg, dan menjadi daya tarik para pelanggan.
Pasalnya di kota Bandung yang menjadi ikon kuliner nusantara, terlalu banyak kuliner yang menggoyang lidah, namun tidak sedikit yang buruk bagi kesehatan.
Di kedai ini, seluruh menu yang ditawarkan adalah masakan rumahan. Selain dapat makan ditempat atau dibungkus, seluruh masakan tersebut juga tersedia dalam bentuk frozen atau beku.
Untuk lebih tahu beri tater-update seputarJawa Barat, bisa klink link di bawah .
IG :
Youtube :
Twitter :
Facebook :
entry.summary: BANDUNG, KOMPAS.TV - Jika usaha-usaha lain meredup ditengah pandemi, lain halnya dengan usaha makanan sehat atau healthy food ini. Masyarakat yang kini semakin sadar akan pentingnya asupan makanan yang sehat bagi tubuh, membuat kedai mamocy tak pernah sepi pelanggan. Setiap harinya, driver ojek daring hilir mudik mengambil pesanan dari kedai miliknya, di kawasan Arcamanik, Kota Bandung. Menurut pemilik kedai, makanan sehat, makanan yang disediakan tanpa bahan pengawet dan msg, dan menjadi daya tarik para pelanggan. Pasalnya di kota Bandung yang menjadi ikon kuliner nusantara, terlalu banyak kuliner yang menggoyang lidah, namun tidak sedikit yang buruk bagi kesehatan. Di kedai ini, seluruh menu yang ditawarkan adalah masakan rumahan. Selain dapat makan ditempat atau dibungkus, seluruh masakan tersebut juga tersedia dalam bentuk frozen atau beku. Untuk lebih tahu beri tater-update seputarJawa Barat, bisa klink link di bawah . IG : Youtube : Twitter : Facebook :

entry.title: சீனாவின் அலிபாபாவை முடக்க டிரம்ப் அதிரடி திட்டம்

link.title: சீனாவின் அலிபாபாவை முடக்க டிரம்ப் அதிரடி திட்டம்

entry.content:
#alibaba #Trump
சீன நிறுவனமான அலிபாபாவை அமெரிக்காவில் முடக்க டிரம்ப் திட்டம்
After banning short video-making app TikTok, US President Donald Trump on Saturday suggested that he may extend the ban on other Chinese companies, including, technology giant Alibaba
entry.summary: #alibaba #Trump சீன நிறுவனமான அலிபாபாவை அமெரிக்காவில் முடக்க டிரம்ப் திட்டம் After banning short video-making app TikTok, US President Donald Trump on Saturday suggested that he may extend the ban on other Chinese companies, including, technology giant Alibaba

entry.title: Amazon Wants To Convert JCPenney And Sears Into Distribution Centers

link.title: Amazon Wants To Convert JCPenney And Sears Into Distribution Centers

entry.content:
Amazon is in talks to convert JCPenney and Sears mall stores stores into distribution centers.
The Wall Street Journal reports this move could position Amazon to build out its order capacity amid the pandemic.
Amazon is discussing working with US mall operator Simon Property Group to convert mall stores into hubs to help complete Amazon’s online orders.
Business Insider predicts Amazon would have several deals in the works by the end of 2020 to pick up stores from struggling retailers.
entry.summary: Amazon is in talks to convert JCPenney and Sears mall stores stores into distribution centers. The Wall Street Journal reports this move could position Amazon to build out its order capacity amid the pandemic. Amazon is discussing working with US mall operator Simon Property Group to convert mall stores into hubs to help complete Amazon’s online orders. Business Insider predicts Amazon would have several deals in the works by the end of 2020 to pick up stores from struggling retailers.

entry.title: Depremin telsiz konuşmaları tüyleri diken diken ediyor

link.title: Depremin telsiz konuşmaları tüyleri diken diken ediyor

entry.content:
17 Ağustos 1999 tarihinde yaşanan ve binlerce insanın hayatını kaybettiği Marmara Depremi’nin üzerinden 21 yıl geçti. Acılar hala ilk günkü gibi tazeliğini korurken, deprem gecesi polis ekiplerinin konuşmaları felaketin boyutunu gözler önüne seriyor.
17 Ağustos 1999 yılında meydana gelen depremin acıları hala tazeliğini korurken, üzerinden 21 yıl geçmesine rağmen izleri Kocaeli’nin her köşesinde görülüyor. Deprem gecesi Kocaeli Emniyet Müdürlüğü ekiplerinin yaptığı konuşmalar felaketin boyutunu gözler önüne seriyor. İl genelinin hemen hemen her mahallesinden anons eden ekipler yıkılan binaların olduğunu ‘155 Haber Merkezi’ne bildiriyor. Ekipler yıkılan binaların olduğunu anons ederken, altında kalanların olduğunu ve çığlıkların geldiğini de ifade ediyor. Dönemin Kocaeli Valisi Memduh Oğuz bir süre sonra telsiz konuşmalarına girerek emniyet müdürlüğünün durumunu soruyor. Ekipler ise binada küçük hasarın olduğunu, kendilerinin dışarıda bulunduğunu ifade ediyor.
entry.summary: 17 Ağustos 1999 tarihinde yaşanan ve binlerce insanın hayatını kaybettiği Marmara Depremi’nin üzerinden 21 yıl geçti. Acılar hala ilk günkü gibi tazeliğini korurken, deprem gecesi polis ekiplerinin konuşmaları felaketin boyutunu gözler önüne seriyor. 17 Ağustos 1999 yılında meydana gelen depremin acıları hala tazeliğini korurken, üzerinden 21 yıl geçmesine rağmen izleri Kocaeli’nin her köşesinde görülüyor. Deprem gecesi Kocaeli Emniyet Müdürlüğü ekiplerinin yaptığı konuşmalar felaketin boyutunu gözler önüne seriyor. İl genelinin hemen hemen her mahallesinden anons eden ekipler yıkılan binaların olduğunu ‘155 Haber Merkezi’ne bildiriyor. Ekipler yıkılan binaların olduğunu anons ederken, altında kalanların olduğunu ve çığlıkların geldiğini de ifade ediyor. Dönemin Kocaeli Valisi Memduh Oğuz bir süre sonra telsiz konuşmalarına girerek emniyet müdürlüğünün durumunu soruyor. Ekipler ise binada küçük hasarın olduğunu, kendilerinin dışarıda bulunduğunu ifade ediyor.

entry.title: MS Dhoni bids adieu international cricket: A look at his unbelievable records

link.title: MS Dhoni bids adieu international cricket: A look at his unbelievable records

entry.content: India’s World Cup-winning captain MS Dhoni on Saturday announced retirement from international cricket.For over a decade, Dhoni’s swashbuckling batting style, especially the famed helicopter shot, gave international bowlers a headache.
entry.summary: India’s World Cup-winning captain MS Dhoni on Saturday announced retirement from international cricket.For over a decade, Dhoni’s swashbuckling batting style, especially the famed helicopter shot, gave international bowlers a headache.

entry.title: Man’s wallet lost in local train found by cops after 14 years in Mumbai

link.title: Man’s wallet lost in local train found by cops after 14 years in Mumbai

entry.content: A man named Hemant Padalkar, lost his wallet in 2006 in a train at Vashi Railway Police Station in Mumbai. According to a police official, Vashi Police Station police nabbed the thief and recovered the wallet at that time but cannot give it back to the complainant as it didn’t find him on the given address. During a campaign, police gave the wallet back to Hemant Padalkar.
entry.summary: A man named Hemant Padalkar, lost his wallet in 2006 in a train at Vashi Railway Police Station in Mumbai. According to a police official, Vashi Police Station police nabbed the thief and recovered the wallet at that time but cannot give it back to the complainant as it didn’t find him on the given address. During a campaign, police gave the wallet back to Hemant Padalkar.

entry.title: Tour de l’Ain 2020 - Egan Bernal : ‘Estoy contento con mis sensaciones’

link.title: Tour de l’Ain 2020 - Egan Bernal : ‘Estoy contento con mis sensaciones’

entry.content: Dominant sur la Route d’Occitanie, la semaine dernière, le coureur de 23 ans est tombé sur plus fort que lui lors de la 32e édition du Tour de l’Ain. Egan Bernal (Team Ineos) a pu constater la supériorité de Primoz Roglic et de sa formation Jumbo-Visma lors de l’épreuve française. Le grimpeur Colombien a même montré des signes de faiblesse lors de la montée du Grand Colombier tout comme son équipe qui n’a pas été en mesure de l’accompagner. Le vainqueur de la Grande Boucle 2019 veut continuer sa montée en puissance avant le départ du Tour de France, dans trois semaines
entry.summary: Dominant sur la Route d’Occitanie, la semaine dernière, le coureur de 23 ans est tombé sur plus fort que lui lors de la 32e édition du Tour de l’Ain. Egan Bernal (Team Ineos) a pu constater la supériorité de Primoz Roglic et de sa formation Jumbo-Visma lors de l’épreuve française. Le grimpeur Colombien a même montré des signes de faiblesse lors de la montée du Grand Colombier tout comme son équipe qui n’a pas été en mesure de l’accompagner. Le vainqueur de la Grande Boucle 2019 veut continuer sa montée en puissance avant le départ du Tour de France, dans trois semaines

entry.title: Coronavirus : vers un élargissement net du port du masque

link.title: Coronavirus : vers un élargissement net du port du masque

entry.content:
Face au rebond de coronavirus, le Premier ministre Jean Castex a appelé à un élargissement du port du masque. De nombreuses communes rentrent dans le rang mais d’autres résistent.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Face au rebond de coronavirus, le Premier ministre Jean Castex a appelé à un élargissement du port du masque. De nombreuses communes rentrent dans le rang mais d’autres résistent. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Jay Bhanushali Appreciates Mahhi Vij For Taking Care Of Tara Without His Support

link.title: Jay Bhanushali Appreciates Mahhi Vij For Taking Care Of Tara Without His Support

entry.content: Jay Bhanushali has started shooting amid the pandemic, and he opened up on how his wife, actress Mahhi Vij, has been taking care of their daughter, Tara. “Without my support, she has been taking care of @tarajaymahhi and whenever I come home she welcomes me with a bright smile and positive environment love you,” he wrote on Instagram.
entry.summary: Jay Bhanushali has started shooting amid the pandemic, and he opened up on how his wife, actress Mahhi Vij, has been taking care of their daughter, Tara. “Without my support, she has been taking care of @tarajaymahhi and whenever I come home she welcomes me with a bright smile and positive environment love you,” he wrote on Instagram.

entry.title: 10 Retiring Legends Your Club Will Miss Next Season!

link.title: 10 Retiring Legends Your Club Will Miss Next Season!

entry.content:
We start off with Leighton Baines, one of the last great Evertonians, and look at how his loyalty to the Toffees deserves the utmost respect.
We look at some La Liga legends in Bruno Sorriano and Aritz Aduriz, and some giants from the Bundesliga in former Bayern Munich pair Claudio Pizarro and Mario Gomez.
Then we take a trip to Africa to honor Egypt’s ageless keeper Essam El-hadary, before heading over to America to put Chris Wondolowski’s name up in lights.
Finally we finish on the biggest name of them all, Spain and Real Madrid legend Iker Casillas, a man who has quite literally won it all.
Remember to like and subscribe, and leave a comment if you think we have missed anyone out!
entry.summary: We start off with Leighton Baines, one of the last great Evertonians, and look at how his loyalty to the Toffees deserves the utmost respect. We look at some La Liga legends in Bruno Sorriano and Aritz Aduriz, and some giants from the Bundesliga in former Bayern Munich pair Claudio Pizarro and Mario Gomez. Then we take a trip to Africa to honor Egypt’s ageless keeper Essam El-hadary, before heading over to America to put Chris Wondolowski’s name up in lights. Finally we finish on the biggest name of them all, Spain and Real Madrid legend Iker Casillas, a man who has quite literally won it all. Remember to like and subscribe, and leave a comment if you think we have missed anyone out!

entry.summary: Trump Swaps Speech With Mad-Libs (VIDEO) Trump Swaps Speech With Mad-Libs (VIDEO) Trump Swaps Speech With Mad-Libs (VIDEO)
